note: Shipped 0.17.0 — a TARGETED, best-effort /gogo:done ship->reap (gogo sweep <slug>...) that touches only the shipped slug(s): Sweeper.Only targeted filter (D4=B, the REV-002 fix) so a ship can never truncate another feature's in-flight /gogo:done; Sweeper.Self self-guard spares the hosting gogo-done session; the named slug's driving gogo-go-<slug> is reaped; board Launch() `remain-on-exit` dropped (FR4) so a finished pane closes. Review APPROVE (REV-002 verified fixed, REV-001 own-host-lingers accepted as works-as-designed, REV-003 doc-sync fixed), test GREEN. before/ holds the plan-time flow baseline for compare mode.

diagrams.title: Targeted ship -> reap flow — /gogo:done marks members shipped then runs gogo sweep <slug>...; matchesOnly spares other features' sessions (REV-002), the self-guard spares the hosting gogo-done session, and the named slug's driving gogo-go-<slug> is reaped
Session lifecycle — running -> exited/closed (no remain-on-exit, FR4) and running -> shipped -> reaped (immediate kill-at-ship, FR1)

Code structure — Sweeper.Self self-guard + Sweeper.Only targeted filter in Sweep() (FR3 + D4=B), wired by cmdSweep from launch.CurrentSession + validated slugs, and launch.Launch with remain-on-exit dropped (FR4)
